arts.ttl: Nicolò Rovella’s rising star at Lazio: A look at his Impact and future
arts.sum: Nicolò Rovella has quickly become a pivotal figure for Lazio this season, showcasing his talent and potential as a midfielder. Since joining the club, he has made a significant impact, with the team losing only one match when he starts—a narrow 1-0 defeat to Juventus in Turin. Calciomercato report how Including games where he came off the bench, Lazio have only suffered two losses, indicating his influence on the pitch. As Rovella approaches the end of his two-year loan from Juventus this June, he is set to become a permanent member of Lazio for a fee of €17 million.
